company.name: Amaris Consulting
company.description: Amaris Consulting is an independent technology and management consulting firm and a wholly-owned brand of the Mantu group. Founded in Geneva in 2007 by two engineers, a lawyer and a financial expert, Amaris helps businesses grow through expert advisory, project delivery, and technology enablement across Life Sciences, Information Systems & Digital, Telecom, and Engineering.

businessLines.name: Life Sciences
businessLines.description: Advisory and project delivery across pharma, biotech, and medical devices — from R&D and clinical operations to regulatory compliance and manufacturing.

businessLines.name: Information Systems & Digital
businessLines.description: Digital transformation, software engineering, data, cloud, and cybersecurity programmes that modernise the enterprise technology stack.

businessLines.name: Telecom
businessLines.description: Network engineering, deployment, and optimisation services for telecom operators and equipment vendors.

businessLines.name: Engineering
businessLines.description: Multi-sector engineering consulting spanning industrialisation, systems engineering, and product development.

positioning.mission: Helping businesses grow is the reason we wake up every day
